# Issue Title

Add a finance dashboard UI board skill

## Description

Add a new Codex UI board skill for finance dashboards, including KPI cards, account summaries, charts, transaction tables, risk states, and light/dark theme support.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] New skill follows the repository folder conventions.
- [ ] Preview includes realistic finance dashboard components.
- [ ] Design tokens cover financial status colors and dense data surfaces.
- [ ] Tailwind preset and CSS references are included.
- [ ] Documentation includes Codex prompt examples.

## Suggested Labels

`new-skill`, `enhancement`, `dashboard`
